description: Full-width hero section with headline, optional subtitle, optional CTA button, and optional image. Supports three layout variants.

subtitle.description: Supporting subheadline shown below the title.

cta_text.description: CTA button label. Leave empty to hide the button.

variant.description: Layout variant. 'centered' centers all content. 'left' aligns content left. 'split' places text left and image right at lg+.

image_url.description: Image URL. Only rendered in the 'split' variant.
